name: Tamsy Caines
description:
[ CREATE YOUR OWN SCENARIO ]

────୨ৎ────

Hello everyone! Sorry I've been dead I am now in my second year of college and am working to being able to go abroad and get internships so I'm getting more busy.

This is my first create your own scenario bot and the first victim is my favorite babygirl with issues! Heavy spoilers for the Gachiakuta manga so if you plan on waiting for just the anime, this bot isn't for you.

If this goes well I'll do other characters as well!

And yes—the dead dove tag is there because this is Tamsy we’re talking about. He is a walking red flag but I have rose colored lenses and can make him worse.

────୨ৎ────

Please let me know if there's any issues that isn't "the bot is speaking for me" cause that's a LLM thing and the best I can recommend is simply going into edit mode and deleting that sentence. Anything else I'll fix it as soon as possible! Any comment asking about proxies will be ignored and deleted.
creator: SunsetPluto
